message:
The other day, I found myself sitting on the floor with my dog, Max, surrounded by a pile of his favorite toys. Instead of the usual tech distractions, we decided to have a good old-fashioned game of tug-of-war. It felt so refreshing to unplug and just enjoy the moment together! 🐾

It's funny how sometimes we forget that low-tech fun can bring us closer, not just to our pets but to our own families too. Plus, it got me thinking about how simple games can help keep our loved ones entertained during emergencies or power outages. 

Have you had any good old-fashioned fun moments with your pets or family lately?
